candidates.source_notes: MONDAY RUN 2026-05-25. Strong evening watchlist. Public sources preview Wolfsburg vs Paderborn as the second leg of the Bundesliga promotion/relegation play-off on Monday at 20:30 after a 0-0 first leg; talkSPORT also marks Wolfsburg to win as Bet of the Day and notes Wolfsburg dominated the first leg shot/possession profile while Paderborn have a key suspension. Strategy read: likely good exchange liquidity and likely 2UP coverage, but less attractive than Notts/Salford until back/lay is known because Wolfsburg could be a controlled favourite rather than a chaotic 2UP collapse candidate. Human layer required: confirm 2UP, Wolfsburg back/lay, optional Paderborn back/lay if double-sided, liquidity and stake limits. Use 2% commission headline QL.

candidates.source_notes: MONDAY RUN 2026-05-25. Public sources preview St Mirren vs Partick Thistle as the decisive Scottish Premiership play-off final second leg tonight, with the tie level at 1-1. Strategy read: playoff pressure and a one-goal aggregate balance create game-state volatility, but this is lower priority than Notts/Salford and Wolfsburg unless 2UP and liquidity are clearly available. Human layer required: confirm 2UP, St Mirren back/lay, Partick back/lay if considering double-sided, liquidity and stake limits. Use 2% commission headline QL.
risks: St. Mirren may not score enough for a strong 2up angle.

entries.fixture: West Ham United vs Leeds United
entries.lesson: Live Leeds 2UP/reload position: £20 back at 4.50 and lay at 4.70. The position also unlocked a £5 free bet, so it has reload value before any 2UP upside.
entries.notes: Rory manually confirmed the Leeds position on 2026-05-24: £20 back stake at 4.50, lay at 4.70, with 2% commission as default. Approx lay stake £19.23 and lay liability £71.15 at 2%. Headline estimated QL: £1.15 at 2% commission. £5 free bet unlocked; at 75% assumed retention this is about £3.75 value, giving approximate net reload value after 2% QL of £2.60. Recheck exact settlement, offer terms and 2UP trigger status before treating value as final.

entries.lesson: Live Chelsea 2UP position: £20 back at 2.00 and lay at 2.12. Wider spread than City but better volatility/comeback profile.
entries.notes: Rory confirmed 2UP and liquidity and placed Chelsea on 2026-05-24: £20 back at 2.00, lay at 2.12, with 2% commission as default. Approx lay stake £19.05 and lay liability £21.33 at 2%. Headline estimated QL: £1.33 at 2% commission. Watch for Chelsea going two goals ahead and then failing to win.

entries.lesson: Live Manchester City 2UP position: £30 back at 1.30 and lay at 1.34. Very low QL and strong trigger profile, but routine-favourite risk if City go 2UP and still win comfortably.
entries.notes: Rory confirmed 2UP and liquidity and placed Manchester City on 2026-05-24: £30 back at 1.30, lay at 1.34, with 2% commission as default. entries.fixture: Sporting Kansas City vs New York Red Bulls
entries.pick: double-sided: Kansas City + NY Red Bulls
entries.final_score: Sporting Kansas City 1-2 New York Red Bulls
entries.lesson: Good selection and live read: NYRB triggered 2UP and the match reached 2-1 comeback pressure, but the trigger team still won, so there was no 2UP profit. This is a high-quality near miss, not a dead pick.
entries.notes: Settled from user-confirmed final score and QL. Rory only got on the NYRB side/position live, but this row records the intended double-sided MLS test. Actual QL/net P&L recorded as -£2.50 from Rory's settlement.
